_meta.method: Same 3-factor consensus as refresh_fo_cloud.py (EMA alignment, MACD, pivot breakout, ROC5). votes==6 -> single-leg, votes in [4,5] -> capped-risk spread.

ICICIBANK.name: ICICIBANK
ICICIBANK.data_warning: Signals based on 2026-07-08 close (yfinance EOD, delayed/unofficial). Verify in Kite before trading.
ICICIBANK.commentary: WAIT (CE 3/6, PE 2/6 -- neither side reached the 4-vote threshold): price 1380.6 is above EMA18 (1371.18) and EMA50 (1331.29) -- established uptrend (+2 CE) | MACD (30.41) is above its signal line (29.32) -- bullish momentum (+1 CE) | price broke below pivot support S1 (1405.47) -- breakdown confirmed (+2 PE) | 5-day momentum (ROC5 0.06%) is muted -- no edge from this factor ⚠ All 4 factors above are derived from the same single price series -- not independent confirmations. A high vote count means one strong trend measured 4 ways, not 4 separate signals agreeing.

RELIANCE.name: RELIANCE
RELIANCE.data_warning: ℹ 6/6 still gets the same capped-risk spread as every other vote level, not extra exposure — this system's own 3-year backtest found the old "6-vote = single-leg" rule was actually its worst-performing bucket (39.7% win, Sharpe 2.71 vs 41.9-45.3% win, Sharpe 3.0-4.8 for spreads). Don't read '6/6' as higher conviction than a 4/6 or 5/6 signal. Signals based on 2026-07-08 close (yfinance EOD, delayed/unofficial).
